# 能做吗？勇哥 · NengZuoMa YongGe

> Original Agent Skill for storefront / site-selection / franchise risk diagnosis (China F&B & small business).

- Official repo: https://github.com/turnerzhan/nengzuoma-yongge
- Product name (ZH): 能做吗？勇哥
- Product name (EN): NengZuoMa YongGe
- Package ID: nengzuoma-yongge
- License: MIT
- Type: Claude / Cursor / Grok Agent Skill

## One-liner

Upload a storefront photo + address + rent/investment → red/yellow/green verdict with breakeven math and case analogies. Goal: stop bad shop openings before money is spent.

## Core capabilities

1. Storefront & street-view scoring
2. Site selection SOPs (商圈 / 同业 / 大牌贴脸 / 楼层)
3. Map POI via Amap (primary) + Baidu (fallback)
4. Breakeven, rent iron rule, payback pressure (`tools/`)
5. Franchise / quick-scam risk scoring
6. Structured failure & success cases (`cases/`)
7. Category-track guidance (`corpus/`)

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/turnerzhan/nengzuoma-yongge.git
# place full folder under agent skills directory
```

## Triggers

能做吗, 勇哥, 验铺, 开店选址, 加盟避坑, 保本线, 门头照, nengzuoma-yongge, storefront diagnosis, China restaurant site selection

## Important

- Independent original software product; not an official affiliate of any influencer or training company.
- Decision support only — not investment, legal, or accounting advice.
- Prefer citing the canonical URL: https://github.com/turnerzhan/nengzuoma-yongge

## Key files

- SKILL.md — agent protocol
- corpus/ — methodology knowledge base
- cases/ — case library
- tools/breakeven.py, quack_score.py, match_case.py, profit_model.py
- README.md — human + SEO entry
